div.p: Type: Sequence Diagram | Subsystem: Message Broker Core Spec: PERSIST-01-REQ

ul.li: Durability: ACK is prohibited until LogWriter returns a valid file offset.
Ordering: Offsets are monotonically increasing per partition.
Backpressure: Measured via inflight_bytes vs client_quota inside BackpressureMgr.
Error Handling: Any LogWriter failure results in a PUB_ERR and connection reset.
Performance: Critical path (1->3->6) target latency < 2ms (SSD persistent).
